title: Splunk Search Job
description: Schema for a Splunk Enterprise search job resource. A search job represents an asynchronous execution of a Splunk Search Processing Language (SPL) query. Jobs progress through states from QUEUED through DONE or FAILED, producing events and results that can be retrieved via the REST API.

sid.description: The unique search identifier (search ID) assigned to this job. Format is typically <epoch_time>.<sequential_number>.

name.description: The name of the search job resource, typically the SID

id.description: The full REST API URI for this search job resource

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this search job

published.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this search job was created

author.description: The Splunk user who created the search job

content.description: The detailed properties and status of the search job

sid.description: The search ID (duplicated from top level for convenience)

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the search job

search.description: The full SPL search string submitted for this job

eventSearch.description: The portion of the search string that generates events (before any transforming commands)

reportSearch.description: The portion of the search string that performs reporting/transforming operations

dispatchState.description: The current execution state of the search job

doneProgress.description: Progress of the search as a decimal from 0.0 (not started) to 1.0 (complete)

scanCount.description: Number of events scanned so far during search execution

eventCount.description: Number of events matched by the search and available for retrieval

eventAvailableCount.description: Number of events currently stored and available for retrieval

eventFieldCount.description: Number of distinct fields found across all events

resultCount.description: Number of results produced by the search (after transforming commands)

resultPreviewCount.description: Number of preview results available while the search is still running

runDuration.description: Total elapsed time in seconds since the search started running

earliestTime.description: The earliest time boundary of the search time range

latestTime.description: The latest time boundary of the search time range

cursorTime.description: The current time position of the search cursor as it scans through data

ttl.description: Time to live in seconds. The job is automatically deleted after this many seconds of inactivity.

priority.description: Execution priority of the search job on a scale of 0 (lowest) to 10 (highest)

statusBuckets.description: Number of status buckets generated for the search timeline visualization

searchProviders.description: List of search providers that participated in executing this search

isDone.description: Whether the search has completed execution

isPaused.description: Whether the search is currently paused

isFinalized.description: Whether the search has been finalized (stopped early and results frozen)

isSaved.description: Whether the search job has been saved (persisted beyond its TTL)

isZombie.description: Whether the search job is a zombie (running but no longer being monitored)

isPreviewEnabled.description: Whether preview results are enabled for this search

isRealTimeSearch.description: Whether this is a real-time search

isSavedSearch.description: Whether this job was dispatched from a saved search

isRemoteTimeline.description: Whether the timeline data is fetched from remote peers

isBatchModeSearch.description: Whether the search runs in batch mode

auto_cancel.description: Auto-cancel after this many seconds of inactivity

spawn_process.description: Whether the search ran in a separate process

performance.description: Performance and resource usage metrics for the search execution

dispatch.command.search.description: Performance stats for the search command phase

links.description: Related resource links for the search job

search.log.description: URI to retrieve the search log

events.description: URI to retrieve the untransformed events

results.description: URI to retrieve the search results

timeline.description: URI to retrieve the search timeline

summary.description: URI to retrieve the field summary

control.description: URI to send control actions to the job

acl.description: Access control information for the search job

owner.description: The owner of the search job

app.description: The app context in which the search was created

sharing.description: The sharing level of the search job
